query:
INSERT INTO jobs (name, address, clientName, status, totalBudget, notes, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
  ('Johnson Residence Remodel', '742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield', 'Bob Johnson', 'active', '85000.00', 'Full kitchen and bathroom renovation. Client wants completion by end of April.', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Downtown Office Build-Out', '100 Commerce Blvd Suite 300', 'Apex Corp', 'active', '220000.00', 'Commercial office space, 3 floors. Electrical and HVAC are priority.', 1, NOW(), NOW());
